## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Chris Perpignani (Cresta) and Marcel (GrowthX) to explore potential collaboration on content strategy and AI-driven marketing solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Cresta focuses on AI-powered customer experience solutions, targeting both large enterprises and mid-market companies](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy and execution services, leveraging AI for efficient content creation and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Both parties identified synergies and mutual interest in exploring collaboration, particularly in scaling content production and improving search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Follow-up steps include GrowthX team preparing a deeper dive proposal and potential involvement of additional Cresta team members (Russell, Devin)](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

## Topics

### Personal Connections and Background

  - [Chris and Marcel discovered numerous mutual connections in the tech industry](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Both have children of similar ages and shared experiences (e.g., Jim Burry classes)](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Marcel's background includes CMO roles at various companies before founding GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

### Cresta's Business Overview

  - [Targets Fortune 500 and mid-market companies (250-5000 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Focuses on AI agents for customer experience and sales teams](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Key customers include Brinks Home, Verizon, and Opportun ($10M+ spend)](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Chris leads sales development and demand generation efforts](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-driven content creation and strategy platform](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [End-to-end service including research, content generation, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Custom workflows and AI agents for efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Demonstrated success with clients like Vappy, Augment, and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Emphasis on creating high-quality, targeted content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Focus on understanding audience motivations and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Leveraging AI for content generation while maintaining brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Importance of visibility in both traditional search and AI-powered search results](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Scaling Cresta's content production to improve keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Leveraging AI for efficient content creation while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Improving signal capture and intent-based outreach for sales teams](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Exploring AI-driven solutions for Cresta's upcoming hackathon](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to discuss potential collaboration with Russell (Cresta team member)](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [GrowthX team (Marcel and Tyler) to prepare a deeper dive proposal for Cresta](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Potential setup of a shared Slack channel for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Marcel to reach out to Devin (Cresta's product marketing lead) for additional context](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to explore specific opportunities and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/7UkpbYFxsZp4Zts4bG4GjoWyDuY2mmyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
